translations.en: Whenever Zakariyya wanted to exhort the Children of Israel, he would look right and left; if he saw Yahya, he would not mention Paradise or the Fire. One day, he sat to exhort them, and Yahya came with his head wrapped and sat among the crowd. Zakariyya looked but did not see Yahya, so he said: 'My beloved Gabriel narrated from Allah, Blessed and Exalted: In Hell is a mountain called the Intoxicated. At its base is a valley called the Angry, which rages with the anger of the Merciful. In it is a pit a hundred years deep, with coffins of fire, chests of fire, garments of fire, chains of fire, and shackles of fire.' Yahya raised his head and cried: 'Woe is me for being heedless of the Intoxicated!' Then he wandered away. Zakariyya went to Yahya's mother and said: 'Go seek Yahya, for I fear we will not see him unless he has tasted death.'
